name: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (The) Dep Shs repstg 1/1000 Pfd Ser D Fltg
summary: The Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (The) Dep Shs repstg 1/1000 Pfd Ser D Fltg represents a fractional ownership in a series of preferred stock issued by Goldman Sachs. These preferred shares have specific features, including a floating interest rate. As a depositary share, it simplifies trading and ownership of the underlying preferred stock.
